name: CIDI-140
description: CIDI-140 is a benchmark of 140 MATH problems equipped with Collaborative Interdependence-Directed Information (CIDI) splits for studying epistemic role framing in LLM multi-agent collaboration. Each problem is decomposed into (shared context, Packet A, Packet B) such that neither agent can progress without the other's deductions. The dataset includes 2,112 conversation transcripts across three framing conditions (C2: natural, C6: peer-aware, C7: active-learner) and 832 ablation transcripts (CFULL: learner framing without split, CEXP: expert framing with split), annotated with CPP (Collaborative Phase Profile) metrics (CDI, CQI, PhAQ) and Agent Epistemic Contribution (AEC) Shapley decomposition.
citation: [Anonymous] (2026). Epistemic Role Framing Elicits Deep Collaboration in LLM Multi-Agent Systems. NeurIPS 2026 Evaluations & Datasets Track. [Anonymous submission]
rai:dataCollection: Conversations generated via GPT-4.1 API under three framing conditions. Problems sourced from MATH benchmark (Hendrycks et al., 2021). Original MATH problem text not redistributed per MATH license; only MATH IDs and derived CIDI splits are included in the corpus file.
rai:dataBiases: The 140-problem corpus was filtered using C7 performance (CDI >= 0.5 in >= 2/3 replications). All estimates are conditional on CIDI-amenable problems. Effect sizes may overestimate framing benefits on unfiltered MATH samples. See benchmark_card.md for full conditionality statement.
rai:annotationsProtocol: CPP rubric annotation by two trained graduate-student annotators, blinded to condition assignment (label masking; randomised presentation order). Disagreements >1 scale point resolved by consensus with a third annotator. Inter-rater reliability: Krippendorff alpha=0.81 (ordinal, n=36), ICC(2,1)=0.83 for CQI, Cohen kappa=0.76 for CDI binary.

distribution.name: phase2_problems.json
distribution.description: 140 MATH problem records with CIDI splits (shared context, Packet A, Packet B). Problem text stripped per MATH license; MATH IDs and derived splits included.

distribution.name: transcripts/C2
distribution.description: Conversation transcripts for condition C2 (natural baseline, no framing). 709 files for 140 problems (3-7 replications each).

distribution.name: transcripts/C6
distribution.description: Conversation transcripts for condition C6 (peer-aware framing). 702 files for 140 problems.

distribution.name: transcripts/C7
distribution.description: Conversation transcripts for condition C7 (active-learner framing). 701 files for 140 problems.

distribution.name: ablations/CFULL
distribution.description: Ablation condition CFULL: C7 active-learner framing with full problem context (no CIDI split). 412 files (8 of 420 planned excluded due to content-policy refusals).

distribution.name: ablations/CEXP
distribution.description: Ablation condition CEXP: CIDI split with expert-solver framing (no active-learner stance). 420 files.

distribution.name: ablations_summary.json
distribution.description: Aggregate statistics for CFULL and CEXP ablation conditions: mean CDI, CQI, PhAQ, SE, and quadrant percentages.

distribution.name: aec_results.jsonl
distribution.description: Per-problem AEC (Agent Epistemic Contribution) solo-run correctness results. One JSON record per line, fields: problem_id, v_A, v_B, v_AB, en, cs, eb.

distribution.name: aec_summary.json
distribution.description: Aggregate AEC statistics: both-solo-zero rate, EN rate, mean CS, mean EB.

distribution.name: benchmark_card.md
distribution.description: Benchmark card documenting corpus construction, selection conditionality, metric definitions, intended use, and known limitations.

distribution.name: REPRODUCE.md
distribution.description: Step-by-step reproduction guide: CIDI split generation, conversation simulation, CPP annotation, AEC scoring.

recordSet.name: CIDI-140 Corpus
recordSet.description: 140 MATH problems with CIDI splits and Phase 2 filtering metadata.

field.name: subject
field.description: MATH subject area (Algebra, Geometry, Number Theory, Prealgebra, Precalculus, Counting & Probability)

field.name: cdi_c7
field.description: Mean CDI under C7 across Phase 1 replications (used for epistemic filter)

recordSet.name: Conversation Transcripts (C2/C6/C7)
recordSet.description: Turn-by-turn conversation logs with CPP annotations for the main experiment conditions.

field.name: condition
field.description: Framing condition: C2, C6, or C7

field.name: cpp_vector
field.description: 12-element binary vector (one per CPP cell, 1 if score>=1)

field.name: quadrant
field.description: Outcome quadrant: COUPLING, PROD_FAIL, TRIVIAL, or COLLAPSE

field.name: correctness
field.description: Answer correctness: correct, incorrect, partial, or unknown

recordSet.name: Ablation Transcripts (CFULL/CEXP)
recordSet.description: Conversation logs for ablation conditions with CPP annotations.

field.name: quadrant
field.description: Outcome quadrant: COUPLING, PROD_FAIL, TRIVIAL, or COLLAPSE

recordSet.name: AEC Solo-Run Results
recordSet.description: Per-problem Shapley decomposition of agent epistemic contributions.

field.name: en
field.description: Epistemic Necessity: 1 if v_AB > max(v_A,v_B), else 0
